g.title: Interrogates the user with clarifying questions to narrow down SaaS niche and monetization model.
Structures the overall workflow and decomposes the task into parallel workstreams.
Cross-references technical constraints with marketing promises to detect and resolve misalignments.
Evaluates the final roadmap quality. If issues found, feeds back to Planning Agent for refinement.
Assembles JSON and Markdown artifacts into a unified HTML dashboard output.
Generates DB schema and system architecture as a JSON artifact.
Produces a 12-week go-to-market roadmap as a Markdown document.
